hero.title: Where Every Frame Begins
hero.subtitle: Discover an exquisite collection of cameras, lenses, lighting and accessories. Reserve your gear in moments — no price guessing, just live availability and a direct line to us.

categories.heading: Explore by Category
categories.subheading: A curated catalogue across the tools that shape your story.

camera.name: Camera
camera.desc: Cinema bodies and rigs for every production scale.

lens.name: Lens
lens.desc: Primes, zooms and anamorphics with real character.

light.name: Light
light.desc: Shape mood and atmosphere with precision.

accessories.name: Accessories
accessories.desc: Stands, gimbals, monitors and the essentials.

features.heading: Booking, Reimagined
features.subheading: No prices to puzzle over — just availability, fair limits, and a direct conversation.

stock.title: Live Availability
stock.desc: Real-time stock so you always know exactly what is ready to book.

limit.title: Fair Reservations
limit.desc: Sensible per-account limits keep the gear available for every filmmaker.

message.title: Direct to Admin
message.desc: Message us the moment you book and get notified the instant we reply.

footer.madeWith: Crafted for the Kurdish film community.

comingSoon.title: This collection is being curated
comingSoon.desc: Our full catalogue — with live stock and instant booking — arrives in the next phase. Check back very soon.
